## RenderlessFilter class

Renders default slot content. It binds to the default slot a [BooleanFilter](./x-types.booleanfilter.md)<!-- -->, the [XEvents](./x-components.xevent.md) that will be emitted when clicking the content, the css classes and if the content should be disabled.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class RenderlessFilter extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Remarks

The default slot expects a root element, if it receives a list of elements, it will renders the first element.

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |

|  [clickEvents?](./x-components.renderlessfilter.clickevents.md) |  | Partial&lt;[XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->&gt; | <i>(Optional)</i> Additional events with its payload to emit when the filter is clicked. |
|  [filter](./x-components.renderlessfilter.filter.md) |  | BooleanFilter | The filter data to render. |
